svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 550px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: kubeadm によるクラスタ構築フロー

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 82px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: kubeadm init（Control Plane ノード）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 238, 243), rgb(21, 39, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(91, 155, 213), rgb(65, 120, 170));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 143px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. Preflight Checks
（前提条件の検証）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 238, 243), rgb(21, 39, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(91, 155, 213), rgb(65, 120, 170));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 213px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. 証明書の生成
（CA, API Server, kubelet 等の TLS 証明書）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 238, 243), rgb(21, 39, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(91, 155, 213), rgb(65, 120, 170));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 283px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. kubeconfig ファイルの生成
（admin.conf, kubelet.conf, scheduler.conf 等）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 355px; margin-left: 81px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. Static Pod マニフェスト生成
（kube-apiserver, kube-controller-manager, kube-scheduler, etcd）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 428px; margin-left: 81px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. kubelet 起動
（Static Pod として Control Plane コンポーネントを起動）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 498px; margin-left: 81px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. アドオンのインストール
（CoreDNS, kube-proxy）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 228, 236), rgb(52, 31, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(229, 115, 115), rgb(194, 96, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 570px; margin-left: 81px;

div.div:
7. Bootstrap Token 生成
（Worker Node の join 用トークン出力）

div.div: kubeadm join（Worker ノード）

div.div:
2. TLS Bootstrap
（Bootstrap Token で API Server に接続し証明書を取得）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.div:
3. kubelet 設定の取得
（Control Plane から kubelet の設定を取得し適用）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 641px;

div.div:

（Worker Node として kubelet を起動しクラスタに参加）
